title: Multi-step Registration - Successful Registration for School Manager
description: Verify that a School Manager can complete the multi-step registration process successfully with all valid inputs, including profile selection, personal details, entity/business data, and financial setup, with real-time validation and ViaCEP address lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Select 'School Manager' as profile type
Fill in valid personal details including CPF, phone number with proper masks
Provide valid entity/business information including CNPJ and address details
Use ViaCEP integration to autofill address based on provided CEP and verify autofill accuracy
Complete financial setup details with valid data
Open and scroll through the Legal Consent Modal
Accept Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to enable submission
Submit the registration form
Confirm registration is completed successfully and user receives activation status

title: Multi-step Registration - Validation Errors with Invalid Inputs
description: Verify that the multi-step registration form enforces Zod validation and mask formatting, preventing submission when required fields are empty, formats are invalid, or ViaCEP lookup fails.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Select 'Canteen Operator' as profile type
Leave required fields empty or input incorrectly formatted CPF/CNPJ, phone, and CEP
Attempt to proceed to the next step of the form
Verify validation errors are displayed for each invalid or missing field
Enter invalid CEP and trigger ViaCEP lookup
Verify appropriate error message is shown indicating ViaCEP retrieval failure
Attempt to submit the form without accepting legal consent
Verify that submission is blocked and a prompt indicates legal consent is required

title: Legal Consent Modal - Mandatory Scroll and Acceptance Enforcement
description: Ensure that the Legal Consent Modal enforces users to scroll through the entire Terms of Use and Privacy Policy content before the acceptance button becomes enabled.

steps.description: Open the Legal Consent Modal during registration
Attempt to accept terms without scrolling
Verify acceptance button is disabled and cannot be clicked
Scroll through the entire content of Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
Verify acceptance button becomes enabled after scrolling completes
Click accept to close the modal
Confirm acceptance is registered and user can proceed with registration

title: Login - Successful Login for School Manager
description: Verify that a registered School Manager can log in successfully using valid credentials and is redirected to the standard dashboard interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the School Manager login page
Enter valid login credentials for School Manager
Click the login button
Verify login is successful and user is redirected to the Manager's dashboard
Confirm that the session token is properly set and maintained

title: Login - Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify that login fails when incorrect credentials are entered for either School Manager or Canteen Operator, and appropriate error messages are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to login page (Manager or Operator)
Enter invalid username/email or password
Attempt to log in
Verify login fails and user is presented with a clear error message
Confirm no session token is issued

title: Session Token Lifecycle - Token Refresh and Persistence
description: Verify that the authentication service correctly handles session token lifecycle, including token refresh, persistence across sessions, and secure logout for both roles.

steps.description: Login as either School Manager or Canteen Operator
Simulate token expiration
Confirm the token is refreshed automatically without forcing re-login
Close and reopen the browser or tab
Verify the session persists if token is still valid
Perform logout action
Confirm session token is cleared and user is redirected to login

title: ViaCEP API Integration - Successful Address Lookup
description: Verify that valid CEP inputs trigger ViaCEP API calls and that responses correctly autofill address fields in the registration form for both roles.

steps.description: Enter a valid CEP in the registration form
Ensure that the ViaCEP API is called with the correct CEP
Verify that address fields are autofilled with the ViaCEP response data

title: ViaCEP API Integration - Handling Invalid or Unreachable CEP
description: Verify the system behavior when ViaCEP returns errors or the CEP is invalid: the form should display appropriate error messages and avoid autofilling address.

steps.description: Enter an invalid or unreachable CEP on the registration form
Confirm that an error message is displayed indicating address lookup failure
Ensure that address fields remain empty or unchanged

title: Role-specific Dashboard Rendering - School Manager
description: Verify that upon login, a School Manager user is redirected to the dashboard designed with comprehensive management and analytics features appropriate for the role.

steps.description: Login as School Manager
Verify the dashboard UI rendered corresponds to the Manager layout
Check presence of management, financial, and operational widgets

title: Role-specific Dashboard Rendering - Canteen Operator
description: Verify that upon login, a Canteen Operator user is redirected to the POS-focused dashboard that supports operational tasks relevant to canteen control and payment processing.

steps.description: Login as Canteen Operator
Verify the dashboard UI rendered is POS-oriented and tailored to operator needs
Confirm presence of quick payment options and operational controls

title: Form Masking Formats - CPF, CNPJ, Phone, CEP
description: Validate that all form input fields enforcing masks for CPF, CNPJ, phone, and CEP correctly format user input and restrict invalid characters.

steps.description: Navigate to registration form
Input unformatted CPF, CNPJ, phone, and CEP values
Confirm that input fields apply correct formatting masks as user types
Try entering invalid characters (letters in numeric fields)
Confirm invalid characters are rejected or not accepted

title: Notification System - Real-time Feedback During Authentication
description: Verify that the notification system (Sonner) provides correct real-time feedback messages on success and failure events during login and registration workflows.

steps.description: Perform successful login
Confirm success notification is displayed
Attempt login with invalid credentials
Confirm failure notification is shown
Complete registration successfully
Confirm success notification is displayed

title: Responsive UI Behavior and Accessibility Compliance
description: Ensure that the key UI components including registration forms, legal consent modal, and dashboards built with Tailwind CSS and React Hook Form are responsive and meet accessibility standards across desktop and mobile devices.

steps.description: Open registration form on various viewport sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Verify UI adapts correctly with no layout breakage
Navigate through forms and modal using keyboard only
Confirm focus indicators are present and navigation is logical
Verify ARIA attributes exist where needed for screen reader support
